# perz.dev

> Portfolio of Percy A., a game designer and developer based in Calgary, Canada. Works across Unity, C#, and VR with a product-design background.

## About

Percy is a designer and developer who specializes in user experience. He has a product-design background and currently builds VR and PC games in Unity and C#. He has roughly five years of experience across startups and game studios.

## Current roles

- Game Designer at Highstreet on Calamity VR (Meta Quest), since December 2023.
- Founder of Smooth Brain Games, an independent studio, since September 2022.

## Selected work

- Calamity VR — multiplayer roguelike for Meta Quest. UX and systems design.
- Supercat — fast-paced action platformer for PC. Movement, combat, and level design.
- Bubble Buddy — student game project. Systems, art, and animation.
- BisectHosting — 21-month run as graphic and content designer. Brand system, partner kits, creator-program assets.

## Contact
